name: 奥西瑞斯 | 精锐分子
nameZh: 奥西瑞斯 | 精锐分子
descriptionEn: Osiris earned his nickname from passing judgement, often too quickly, on his marks. His reasoning is simple: \"When your time is as valuable as mine, why make small talk?\" Confident, skilled, and quick to act, Osiris takes pleasure in dispatching targets with unrivaled efficiency. Any objections?
descriptionZh: 奥西瑞斯具有极强的判断力，从而得到了外号。他常常能做到一语中的， 道理很简单，他说道：“当你的时间和我一样珍贵时，干嘛还要闲聊？” 由于奥西瑞斯的自信，技术精湛以及反应灵敏，他总是能以超高效率击杀目标，对此他乐在其中。 有反对意见吗？
